headlines.title: Visa, Mastercard settle merchant claims
headlines.summary: About 65 retailers suing the networks over card swipe fees in a New York case have now settled claims.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, visa ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

political_items.title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
political_items.summary: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: Kanye West concert in Poland cancelled over antisemitic comments
political_items.summary: The UK government blocked the rapper from entering the country over his history of making pro-Nazi and racist statements.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: Iranian footballers say Australia has given them 'hope' for safe future
political_items.summary: The duo had sought aslyum after their football team did not sing the national anthem during a match.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.
